expo.name: NoStress
expo.description: NoStress — Découvrez et réservez les meilleurs événements au Togo et au Bénin : concerts, soirées, festivals, ateliers. Billetterie mobile, favoris, et notifications près de chez vous.

infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Turning on your location will allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to show you nearby places and events.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Turning on your location will allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to show you nearby places and events.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: $(PRODUCT_NAME) needs access to your camera so you can take photos to add to your events or profile.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: $(PRODUCT_NAME) needs access to your photos so you can choose your partner's logo or your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: $(PRODUCT_NAME) needs to save your tickets to your photo library.
